indications_and_usage: For the temporary relief of minor aches and pains due to headache, muscular aches, minor pain of arthritis, and to reduce fever.
dosage_and_administration: Adults and children 12 years and over: take 1 tablet every 4 to 6 hours while symptoms persist.
warnings: Stomach bleeding warning: This product contains an NSAID, which may cause severe stomach bleeding.
adverse_reactions: May cause nausea, heartburn, and stomach upset.
